error_signature: La question n’a pas de lien avec le domaine défini
title: AI Agent returns unrelated question error
symptom: The AI Agent outputs 'La question n’a pas de lien avec le domaine défini' for each question processed from the xlsx file.
applies_when: Using AI Agent to process questions from an xlsx file
Output is being saved to a CSV file
not_this_if: AI Agent produces valid responses for all questions
root_cause: The AI Agent is unable to relate the questions from the xlsx file to its defined domain, leading to repeated error messages for each question. This often occurs when the questions are outside the scope of the AI's training or context.
fix_steps: Implement an output parser to format the AI Agent's responses into JSON.
Use a Set node to pivot the output into two columns: 'question' and 'output'.
Ensure the final output is structured correctly before saving to CSV.
agent_instruction: Use an output parser and a Set node to format the AI Agent's responses correctly.
